issues.description: Wrong action type: uses 'TrashFromHand' but effect text says 'Trash 2 cards from the top of your deck' - should trash from deck, not hand
Wrong action type: uses 'PowerBoost' but effect text says 'give ... −1 cost' - this is a cost reduction, not a power boost. There is no DSL action for cost modification currently
Wrong amount: uses -1000 for power but the effect reduces cost by 1, not power by 1000
